LightningComponentBundle.description: Runs Data Cloud ANSI SQL from App Builder via ConnectApi.CdpQuery (same org) and shows results in lightning-datatable. Custom header icon and title color; optional on-page table configuration (SLDS data table options); query runs on page load.

property.name: headerIconName
property.label: Header icon name
property.description: SLDS icon (namespace:name), e.g. utility:table, utility:graph, standard:account.

property.name: titleColorHex
property.label: Title color (hex)
property.description: Title text color: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA (no spaces).

property.name: showTitle
property.label: Show title (icon and heading)
property.description: When false, hides the header icon and title by default; users can re-enable from the table configuration panel when it is visible.

property.name: showTableConfiguration
property.label: Show table configuration panel
property.description: When true, shows checkboxes and numeric options for lightning-datatable (row selection, row numbers, column widths, resize, wrap, footer).

property.name: defaultSql
property.label: Data Cloud SQL query
property.description: SQL executed when the page loads. Not shown on the page.

property.name: autoRunOnLoad
property.label: Auto-run on load (legacy)
property.description: Retained for existing Lightning pages. The component always runs the query once when the page loads; this flag is no longer used in the UI.

property.name: defaultColumnWidth
property.label: Default column width (px)
property.description: Optional initial width for every column (leave empty for platform defaults).

property.name: showRowSelectionColumn
property.label: Show selection checkboxes
property.description: When enabled, shows row checkboxes. Off by default for immutable Data Cloud results.

property.name: cardTitle
property.label: Card title
property.description: Heading next to the header icon.

property.name: headerIconName
property.label: Header icon name
property.description: SLDS icon (namespace:name), e.g. utility:table, utility:graph.

property.name: titleColorHex
property.label: Title color (hex)
property.description: #RGB, #RRGGBB, or #RRGGBBAA (no spaces).

property.name: showTitle
property.label: Show title (icon and heading)
property.description: Default visibility for the icon + title row; can be toggled in the configuration panel.

property.name: showTableConfiguration
property.label: Show table configuration panel
property.description: When true, shows on-page checkboxes for datatable layout (selection, row numbers, widths, resize, wrap, footer).

property.name: defaultSql
property.label: Data Cloud SQL query
property.description: SQL executed when the page loads. Not shown on the page.

property.name: autoRunOnLoad
property.label: Auto-run on load (legacy)
property.description: Retained for existing Lightning pages. The component always runs the query once when the page loads; this flag is no longer used in the UI.

property.name: maxRows
property.label: Max rows (auto LIMIT)
property.description: When your SQL has no LIMIT, Apex appends LIMIT up to this value (capped at 2000).

property.name: defaultColumnWrap
property.label: Wrap text in columns
property.description: Sets wrapText on each column definition for long cell values.

property.name: defaultColumnWidth
property.label: Default column width (px)
property.description: Optional initial width for every column (leave empty for platform defaults).

property.name: showRowSelectionColumn
property.label: Show selection checkboxes
property.description: When enabled, shows row checkboxes. Off by default for immutable Data Cloud results.

property.name: showRowNumberColumn
property.label: Show row numbers
property.description: Shows the row index column per SLDS data table patterns.

property.name: columnWidthsMode
property.label: Column widths mode
property.description: lightning-datatable: auto or fixed.

property.name: minColumnWidth
property.label: Minimum column width (px)
property.description: Minimum width for resizable columns.

property.name: wrapTableHeader
property.label: Wrap table header
property.description: Wrap long column headers (lightning-datatable).

property.name: wrapTextMaxLines
property.label: Wrap text max lines
property.description: When wrapping, maximum lines per cell before truncation.

property.name: suppressBottomBar
property.label: Suppress bottom bar
property.description: Hides the table footer bar when supported by lightning-datatable.
